docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $930.00 FILED BY VINAYAGAM, NITHYA AS TO DEFENDANT RECTOR, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VINAYAGAM, NITHYA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VINAYAGAM, NITHYA AS TO DEFENDANT RECTOR, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
